title: selenipedium × grande var. atratum
intro: Selenipedium × grande var. atratum is a hybrid orchid species, resulting from the cross between Selenipedium palmifolium and Selenipedium steyermarkii, and is also known as the 'dark-leaved Selenipedium'. While it is not widely known for its medicinal properties, its relatives in the Selenipedium genus have been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments. The health benefits of Selenipedium × grande var. atratum are largely anecdotal, but it is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which could potentially benefit cardiovascular health and reduce oxidative stress. However, there is limited information available on the herbal preparations of Selenipedium × grande var. atratum, and further research is needed to confirm its medicinal properties and potential health benefits.
